content.query:
SELECT ikr_id, Email, DateReceived, FirstName, LastName, ProductID, SRS_ID
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_in1_InboundQueue1]
 where 
 Email in 
 (
'Spyman4099@icloud.com'
 )
 order by Email


select * from ODS.LP_MAC_cst_Customers where id = 626027 -- jimmyjburg@yahoo.com


select EntryDate, * from ODS.LP_SWR_Lds_Leads 
where 
DateEntered >= '2023-03-01' and 
cst_id in
(
 select id from ODS.LP_SWR_cst_Customers where Email in 
 (
     'brianfrana61@yahoo.com'
 )
)


select * from ODS.LP_PBC_in1_InboundQueue1 where LogNumber = '640d3f3ada05b5429de8'
 

 select * from ODS.LP_MAC_brz_BranchZips where zip in
 (
     '55131',
'53006',
'53048',
'53963',
'54960',
'53005',
'53008',
'53045',
'53122',
'53146',
'53150',
'53151',
'53186',
'53187'
 )

 select distinct zip, brn_id from ODS.LP_MAC_brz_BranchZips where zip IN
 (
     '27023',
'27050'
 )
and prg_id = 'GSY'
